maparts.title: Creeper Face
maparts.creator: Notch_Clone
maparts.description: A classic Creeper face rendered in full map resolution. One of the most iconic builds on 6b6t.

maparts.title: Ender Dragon Sky
maparts.creator: VoidWalker99
maparts.description: The Ender Dragon soaring through the End dimension. Incredible depth and shading.

maparts.title: Nether Fortress
maparts.creator: BlazeMaster
maparts.description: Detailed recreation of a Nether Fortress with blazes and wither skeletons.

maparts.title: Ocean Monument
maparts.creator: Aquanaut_X
maparts.description: An underwater ocean monument with guardians. Beautiful blue color palette.

maparts.title: Diamond Pickaxe
maparts.creator: MinerKing
maparts.description: Pixel-perfect diamond pickaxe. A tribute to every Minecraft player's first diamond tool.

maparts.title: Steve Portrait
maparts.creator: PixelPainter
maparts.description: A hyper-detailed portrait of Steve, the original Minecraft character. Stunning detail in the face.

maparts.title: Ancient City
maparts.creator: DeepDarkDave
maparts.description: The largest map art on 6b6t! A full recreation of the Ancient City biome with the Warden lurking.

maparts.title: Cherry Blossom
maparts.creator: SakuraBuild
maparts.description: A peaceful cherry blossom grove. The pink and white palette is perfectly blended.
